title: malaxis urbana
intro: Malaxis urbana, also known as the urban orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malaxis urbana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically harvested for its roots and leaves, which are then prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in traditional remedies such as decoctions or poultices.
